title: triticum durum f. trevesium
intro: Triticum durum f. trevesium, also known as Spelt, is an ancient species of wheat that belongs to the grass family and is considered a pseudo-cereal due to its ability to produce edible seeds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of consuming Triticum durum f. trevesium include improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function, making it a popular choice for those seeking a natural remedy. Herbal preparations of Triticum durum f. trevesium can be found in the form of tea, capsules, and whole grains, which can be easily incorporated into a healthy diet.
